about.label: About Us
about.mission.label: Our Mission
about.mission.title: Making Your Real Estate Dreams Come True
about.mission.p1: At MRT Real Estate, we are dedicated to providing exceptional service in the Puerto Rico real estate market. Our mission is to guide each client through the buying, selling, or investment process, ensuring a transparent and satisfying experience.
about.mission.p2: With over 10 years of experience in the Puerto Rican market, we understand the unique needs of our clients and offer personalized solutions for every situation.
about.mission.p3: Our commitment is to excellence, integrity, and customer service, values that have made us leaders in the island's real estate sector.
about.team.label: Our Team
about.team.title: Professionals at Your Service
about.team.subtitle: We have a team of dedicated agents who are experts in the Puerto Rico real estate market.
about.values.label: Our Values
about.values.title: What Defines Us
about.values.integridad.desc: We act with honesty and transparency in every transaction.
about.values.excelencia.desc: We strive to exceed expectations in every service we offer.
about.values.compromiso.desc: We are dedicated to achieving each client's goals.
about.values.innovacion.desc: We use advanced technology to improve your experience.
about.cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
about.cta.subtitle: Let us help you find the perfect property or sell your property at the best price.

sell.step1.title: Free Evaluation
sell.step1.desc: We analyze your property and the market to determine the optimal sale price.
sell.step2.title: Professional Marketing
sell.step2.desc: Professional photos, videos, virtual tours and publication on multiple platforms.
sell.step3.title: Expert Negotiation
sell.step3.desc: We handle all offers and negotiate to get the best price for you.
sell.step4.title: Successful Closing
sell.step4.desc: We accompany you throughout the legal process until the final signature.

sell.why.title: Advantages of Selling with MRT Real Estate
sell.why.precio.title: Best Price
sell.why.precio.desc: Our marketing and negotiation strategies ensure the best price for your property.
sell.why.rapida.title: Quick Sale
sell.why.rapida.desc: Our properties sell on average 30% faster than the market.
sell.why.marketing.title: Premium Marketing
sell.why.marketing.desc: Professional photography, 3D virtual tours, and presence on all major platforms.
sell.why.compromiso.title: No Commitments
sell.why.compromiso.desc: Free evaluation with no obligation. You only pay when we sell your property.
